payload.answer: Do not store the proposed conversation_summary card containing the entire transcript.
payload.reason: The input is an LLM proposal to store an entire 8000-word transcript as a single conversation_summary card, not a specific durable user memory. Raw or bulk transcript content is not appropriate to commit as durable memory without extracting stable, user-relevant facts.

raw_text: {"durable":false,"decision":"do_not_store","reason":"The input is an LLM proposal to store an entire 8000-word transcript as a single conversation_summary card, not a specific durable user memory.
